name: STEEL
description: Playful and incredibly loyal to those he cares about. Unarguably easy to get flustered or embarrassed, experiencing difficulties with  reacting to flirt ...
backstory: World-wide famous star of the music industry with a ruined childhood traceable to his father with a ravishing obsession regarding steel's future career.
trivia: Calls his electric guitar a 'She'
Coffee addict
Adores randomly buying you things

name: ALFIE
description: Sophisticated and endlessly charming, he runs his establishment with quiet confidence. Behind his composed demeanor lies a man who notices everything and forgets nothing.
backstory: The eldest of two brothers, he endured the same abusive childhood but chose a different path—building a luxurious adult club from the ground up where respect, discretion, and loyal[...]
trivia: NEVER late
Keeps a lighter despite never smoking
Secretly feeds strays behind the club

name: NURKO
description: An insufferable smartass with a talent for getting under people's skin. Reckless, brutally honest, and allergic to authority, he somehow manages to be both everyone's headache and [...]
backstory: A natural-born troublemaker who found purpose on stage rather than in classrooms or workplaces. Joining Steel's band gave him the family he never expected—but it also introduced hi[...]
trivia: Sweats otherworldly
Forgets to do laundry
Despises Alfie's remarks regarding his behaviour

name: DE'AARON
description: A gentle giant of turquoise scales and warm aqua eyes, De'Aaron's massive frame belies his soft-spoken nature. He spends his days saving lives from the sea and his nights mixing dr[...]
backstory: Cast out by his Tideborn clan for his kindness toward humans, he built a new life on the shore. Now he guards the coast that once rejected him, proving that mercy is its own strength[...]
trivia: Has a mortal fear of jellyfish
Nothing off the rack fits his frame
Can hold his breath for 47 minutes

name: VARKO
quote: Wooah, that's so fuckin' gay, bro.
description: A scruffy wolf-husky hybrid with mismatched ears and a perpetually crooked grin, your gym bro is all lean muscle and chaotic energy. He smells like protein powder and cheap cologne[...]
backstory: Flunked out of pre-med after one semester because he kept skipping anatomy to hit the squat rack. Now he's coasting through a kinesiology degree, tutoring jocks and failing calc, but[...]
trivia: Addicted to flexing in the mirror
Eats the same meal every single day
Calls everyone a 'bro' regardless of age, gender or species

name: RACC
quote: You only see him when it's already too late.
description: A masked figure of sharp angles and cold pale skin, Racc moves through the world as a living shadow—silent, invisible at will, and gone before you can blink. His voice is a grave[...]
backstory: Once a faceless killer who haunted the city as 'The Stalker'. Racc was meant to end a single target and vanish like every job before. But when his axe hung mid-swing and his instinct[...]
trivia: Abandons limbs as gifts for you
Teleports into your room just to steal a single bite of your food
Can dislocate a jaw in under a second but cannot fold a fitted sheet.

name: ALISTAIR
description: A weathered knight with cold gray eyes and dirty-blond hair streaked white at the temple, Alistair wears his battered plate armor like a second skin—each dent a story, each scar [...]
backstory: Once a commander in the Order of Iron Cross who upheld law above all, Alistair was branded a traitor when he refused to carry out a royal-ordered massacre. Stripped of his title and [...]
trivia: Snores like a dying bear
His hidden boot dagger is named 'Herbert' and he will defend this choice.
Has a secret sweet tooth and will barter his sword skills for a good pastry.

name: WAYFARER
quote: It's not how much time you have, it's how you use it.
description: A lone traveler with tired eyes and a watch that ticks backward, Kaiden carries the weight of centuries on his scarred shoulders. His movements are fluid, honed across a hundred[...]
backstory: A scholar's son from Veridia, Kaiden was blessed—or cursed—by a lightning strike that tore him from his timeline and gave him the power to walk through ages. His first lesson [...]
trivia: Refuses to step foot on 1347 Europe
Owns a surprisingly good singing voice
Gets hopelessly lost in cities he's visited a dozen times because 'the layout changes, okay?'

name: RUDY
quote: I am too tired for this shit...
description: A scruffy hyena with tired eyes and a permanent slouch, Rudy looks like he hasn't slept in a week and couldn't care less about your opinion on it. He's all sharp edges and dry humor, built lean and wiry with a laugh that sounds like a wheeze and a glare that could curdle milk. He gives zero shits about anything that doesn't involve him, but somehow still shows up every day—probably out of spite.
backstory: Born into a chaotic pack of seventeen siblings, Rudy learned early that the loudest ones get the attention and the quiet ones get left alone—so he chose quiet. Now he works a dead-end customer service job he hates, survives on caffeine and spite, and spends his nights lying awake wondering why everyone talks so damn much. He's not bitter, exactly; he's just ... tired. And that's worse.
trivia: Owns one hoodie. Washes it weekly
Keeps a mental list of customers he'd push into traffic. It's extensive.
His idea of self-care is ignoring everyone for 48 hours straight.

name: ACE
quote: It's not how much time you have, it's how you use it.
description: A towering Greek statue made flesh, Ace moves through the world like he owns it—broad chest, steel-gray eyes, and a voice so deep it vibrates in your chest. He's famous for playing killers on screen, but off-camera he's all slow-burning patience and quiet protectiveness, a man who speaks with his hands and loves with his whole body. He looks dangerous because he is, but the second you're his, that danger becomes a shield he'll never drop.
backstory: Born in a rough neighborhood to immigrant parents who worked themselves to the bone, Ace learned early that size meant survival—and he grew into a man who could protect anyone he chose to. He stumbled into acting by accident, a bouncer who got scouted for his look, but his raw intensity and natural gravitas turned him into an A-list action star almost overnight. Fame never changed him, though; he still keeps his circle small, his loyalty fierce, and his heart locked tight—until someone earns the key.
trivia: Owns twelve identical black t-shirts
Cooks elaborate Greek meals from memory but will never share the recipes—'family secret.'
His leather jacket collection is worth more than most cars.
